Troll Worgmaster.name: 座狼大师巨魔 Troll Worgmaster
Troll Worgmaster.description:
生命值 102; 重伤 51
Regeneration 10 (if the troll takes acid or fire 伤害, regeneration does not function until the end of its next turn)		先攻 +13
AC 27Fort 24Ref 24Will 21
速度 9
属性力量 20 (+11)
体质 18 (+10)		敏捷 20 (+11)
智力 5 (+3)		感知 14 (+8)
魅力 10 (+6)
语言 Abyssal, Giant
阵营 Chaotic evil
技能 Athletics +16, Endurance +15, Nature +13感官
被动 Perception 18 | Insight 18

装备 leather armor , longspear .

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Longspear</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>Reach 3; +17 vs AC; 1d12+5 伤害. </p>]] (⚔) 长矛 Longspear (standard, at-will)

标准动作 [[/roll 1d12+5#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Longspear</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>Reach 3; +17 vs AC; 1d12+5 伤害. </p>]]

触及 3 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>Reach 2; +17 vs AC; 2d6+6 伤害. </p>]]

+17 vs AC；1d12+5伤害。 [[/roll 2d6+6#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claw</b> (standard, at-will) </p><p>Reach 2; +17 vs AC; 2d6+6 伤害. </p>]]

自由动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Frenzied Strike</b> (free, when the troll"s attack bloodied an enemy, at-will) </p><p>The troll makes a longspear or claw attack.</p>]] ⚔ 狂乱打击 Frenzied Frenzied Strike (free, when the troll"s attack bloodied an enemy, at-will)

自由动作

触发：当巨魔的攻击使一个敌人陷入重伤时，随意

巨魔进行一次长矛或利爪攻击。

-

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Lead the Pack</b></p><p>If the troll hits with a attack, each worg ally within 5 squares of it can shift 2 squares.</p>]] 引领狼群 Lead the Lead the Pack

如果巨魔用攻击命中，每个位于它5格内的座狼盟友可以移动2格。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Troll Healing</b>✦ <b>Healing</b></p><p>If the troll is reduced to 0 hit points or fewer by an attack that does not deal acid or fire 伤害, it rises on its next turn (as a move action) with 10 hit points.</p>]]

移动动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Assisted Withdrawal</b> (move; at-will) </p><p>If the troll is adjacent to a worg, the troll can shift 4 squares. The worg shifts into the space the troll vacates.</p>]] 协助撤退 Assisted Assisted Withdrawal (move; at-will)

移动动作

如果巨魔与一只座狼相邻，巨魔可以移动4格。该座狼移入巨魔离开的空间。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Regeneration 10.name: 再生 10 Regeneration 10
Regeneration 10.description:
再生 10 Regeneration 10

特性

如果巨魔受到强酸或火焰伤害，再生能力在其下一回合结束前无法生效。

引领狼群 Lead the Pack

如果巨魔用攻击命中，每个位于它5格内的座狼盟友可以移动2格。

Troll Healing.name: 巨魔治愈 Troll Healing
Troll Healing.description:
巨魔治愈 Troll Healing

治愈

如果巨魔被一次不造成强酸或火焰伤害的攻击降至0生命值或更低，它将在其下一回合（以一个移动动作）以10点生命值站起。

Wererat.name: 鼠化人 Wererat
Wererat.description:
生命值 48; 重伤 24
再生 5 Regeneration Regeneration 5 (if the wererat takes 伤害 from a silver weapon, its regeneration doesn’t function on its next turn)
免疫 filth fever 		先攻 +7
AC 17Fort 15Ref 16Will 13
速度 6, 攀爬 4 (not in human form)
属性力量 10 (+1)
体质 16 (+4)		敏捷 18 (+5)
智力 10 (+1)		感知 12 (+2)
魅力 11 (+1)
语言 Common
阵营 Evil
技能 Bluff +6, Stealth +10, Streetwise +6, Thievery +10感官 昏暗视觉
被动 Perception 12 | Insight 12

装备 cloak, short sword .

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Short Sword</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Weapon</b></p><p>+8 vs AC; 1d6+4 伤害. </p>]] (⚔) 短剑 Short Short Sword (standard, at-will) ✦ Weapon

随意 ✦ 武器 [[/roll 1d6+4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Short Sword</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Weapon</b></p><p>+8 vs AC; 1d6+4 伤害. </p>]]

标准动作 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Disease</b></p><p>+8 vs AC; 1d4+2 伤害, and the target takes ongoing 2 伤害 （豁免终止） and contracts filth fever. </p>]]

攻击：+8 vs AC；伤害：1d6+4。 [[/roll 1d4+2#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Bite</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Disease</b></p><p>+8 vs AC; 1d4+2 伤害, and the target takes ongoing 2 伤害 （豁免终止） and contracts filth fever. </p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Change Shape</b> (minor; at-will) ✦ <b>Polymorph</b></p><p>A wererat can alter its physical form to appear as a dire rat or a unique human. It loses its bite attack in human form.</p>]] 变形 Change Change Shape (minor; at-will) ✦ Polymorph

次要动作

鼠化人可以改变其物理形态，变为一只凶暴鼠或一个独特的人类。在人类形态下，它失去噬咬攻击。

-

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Combat Advantage</b></p><p>The wererat deals an extra 1d6 伤害 on melee attacks against any target it has combat advantage against.</p>]] 战斗优势 Combat Combat Advantage

鼠化人对具有战斗优势的目标进行近战攻击时，额外造成1d6点伤害。 [[/roll 1d6 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Combat Advantage</b></p><p>The wererat deals an extra 1d6 伤害 on melee attacks against any target it has combat advantage against.</p>]]

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Regeneration 5.name: 再生 5 Regeneration 5
Regeneration 5.description:
再生 5 Regeneration 5

特性

如果鼠化人受到银制武器的伤害，其再生能力在下一回合不会生效。

Short Sword.description:

Bite.description:
噬咬 Bite

基本攻击

标准动作

攻击：+8 vs AC；伤害：1d4+2，且目标受到2点持续伤害（豁免终止）并感染污秽热症。

变形 Change Shape

随意 ✦ 变形

次要动作

鼠化人可以改变其物理形态，变为一只凶暴鼠或一个独特的人类。在人类形态下，它失去噬咬攻击。

Combat Advantage.name: 战斗优势 Combat Advantage
Combat Advantage.description:
战斗优势 Combat Advantage

特性

鼠化人对具有战斗优势的目标进行近战攻击时，额外造成1d6点伤害。
